title: Withered Fragments
description: Wither skeletons that do not drop a skull may instead drop a skull fragment.
body:
# Withered Fragments

This mod adds an alternative way to obtain **Wither Skeleton Skulls**.

A new item, **Wither Skull Fragment**, can drop from Wither Skeletons. If a Wither Skeleton does not drop a skull, it has a chance to drop a fragment instead.

9 fragments can be crafted into 1 Wither Skeleton Skull.

![Wither Skull Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28b2e343b9cd796a92d623aac1f4851c7335fc1f.png)

This mechanic increases the overall number of skulls obtained from farming, resulting in approximately **2× more skulls on average**, while keeping the original drop unchanged.
